# Arduino UNO R4 WiFi - official mechanical reference

This folder contains the official STEP model of the board referenced by the
project firmware.

## Source

- Product: Arduino UNO R4 WiFi, SKU `ABX00087`.
- Official page: <https://docs.arduino.cc/hardware/uno-r4-wifi>
- Official STEP archive:
  <https://docs.arduino.cc/resources/models/ABX00087-step.zip>

## Files

- `ABX00087-step.zip`: original unmodified archive.
- `UNO_R4_WIFI.step`: model extracted from the official archive.
